label: Classroom Pak
blurb: K-12 Education, Tutoring & Childcare. Parent communication, grading rote work, and lesson planning.

skills.label: Parent Teacher Conference Summarizer
skills.method: Takes the teacher's bullet points and drafts a warm, professional email to the parents summarizing the student's progress and agreed-upon next steps.
trigger_examples: saves teachers 5 hours of administrative typing a week

skills.label: Substitute Teacher Binder Builder
skills.method: Formats the teacher's rough lesson plan, class roster, and behavioral notes into a clean, easy-to-read printable PDF for the substitute.
trigger_examples: allows sick teachers to actually rest instead of writing plans at 4 am

skills.label: Student Behavior Incident Formatter
skills.method: Translates a teacher's frustrated, emotional note into a neutral, objective, and legally sound incident report for the principal's office.
trigger_examples: protects teachers and schools from administrative pushback

skills.label: Math Worksheet Generator
skills.method: Generates 30 unique, printable math problems aligned with specific Common Core standards, complete with an answer key for the teacher.

skills.label: Field Trip Permission Chaser
skills.method: Cross-references the digital class roster, sending automated SMS reminders only to the parents who haven't signed the zoo field trip form.
trigger_examples: stops teachers from having to play debt-collector

skills.label: Supply List Amazon Cart Builder
skills.method: Turns a teacher's classroom wishlist (crayons, tissues, markers) into a one-click Amazon affiliate cart to email to the PTA.
trigger_examples: increases classroom funding and parent participation

skills.label: Reading Level Text Adapter
skills.method: Takes a current event news article and rewrites it to a 3rd-grade Lexile reading level so younger students can participate in current events.
trigger_examples: differentiates instruction for diverse learners instantly

skills.label: Daycare Daily Photo Captioner
skills.method: Takes a photo uploaded by a daycare worker and generates a cheerful caption ("Tommy loved the sensory bin today\!") to send to anxious parents.
trigger_examples: builds extreme trust with high-paying daycare clients

skills.label: Iep Goal Progress Tracker
skills.method: Extracts daily behavioral/academic observations from the teacher's notes and formats them into the state-mandated Individualized Education Program (IEP) reporting format.

skills.label: Tutor Invoice Generator
skills.method: Tracks hours logged per student, generating a weekly Stripe/Venmo invoice sent directly to the parents with a summary of what was covered.
